title: ferolia indica
intro: Ferolia indica, also known as Indian gentian, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Ferolia indica has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
